metadata.description: Comprehensive UI/UX design resources covering usability, accessibility, design systems, platform guidelines (Apple HIG, Material 3), design tokens (DTCG 2025.10), performance UX (Core Web Vitals), modern interaction patterns, UI pattern inspiration, demographic-inclusive design, cultural patterns, CRO, AI design tools, and interface simplification for non-technical users
